plugin.name: Daily Fortune Cookie
plugin.description: A cozy daily note from a little fortune cookie.
config.dailyTime.label: Daily time
config.dailyTime.description: Local 24-hour time for the daily fortune, like 10:00.
command.today.title: Read today's fortune
command.today.description: Share the deterministic fortune for today.
command.another.title: Another fortune
fortune.0: A gentle pause can make the next step easier.
fortune.1: Small kindnesses have a way of finding warm corners.
fortune.2: Your desk may feel lighter after one tidy breath.
fortune.3: A little curiosity is enough to open a friendly door.
fortune.4: Soft focus still counts as progress.
fortune.5: The coziest plans leave room for tea and wiggles.
fortune.6: A kind word to yourself travels farther than it seems.
fortune.7: One small finish can brighten the whole shelf.
fortune.8: Let today be shaped by care, not hurry.
fortune.9: A fresh idea may arrive after you stretch.
fortune.10: Tiny rituals can make ordinary moments sparkle.
fortune.11: You can begin again as softly as you like.
